_meta.name: Manga catalog — FLUX character portrait (template)
_meta.description: Template aligned with scripts/image_generation/comfyui_workflows/flux_txt2img_manga.json. RunComfy serverless uses deployment overrides; local tooling may substitute {{positive_prompt}}. Uses flux1-dev (full guidance) at steps=28 cfg=3.5 with dpmpp_2m/karras — schnell (4-step distilled) is incompatible with steps>=8 and cfg>1, which silently degraded mecha/dark_fantasy/fantasy_adventure outputs (see docs/PHOENIX_OMEGA_PRODUCTION_AUDIT_2026-04-29.md drift autopsy).
